title: daphne mucronata subsp. linearifolia
intro: Daphne mucronata subsp. linearifolia, also known as Linear-leaved Daphne, is a plant species in the family Thymelaeaceae. It is a shrub native to South Africa, known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Linear-leaved Daphne include reducing fever, treating wounds and skin irritations, and alleviating respiratory problems such as asthma and bronchitis. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared as an infusion or decoction for herbal remedies, often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
